ques: Compare the prices for round-trip flights from New York to Tokyo for a departure on July 10, 2026, and a return on July 24, 2026, and select the option with the least number of stops.
answer: Selected the nonstop (0-stop, least stops) round-trip JFK–Tokyo Haneda on American for €1,667 — the cheapest nonstop option (others: United €1,668, JAL €1,728, ANA €1,825+). One-stop itineraries were cheaper (from €1,318, e.g. Qatar Airways) but have more stops, so the least-stops choice is the €1,667 American nonstop.
